title: The Neural Path
author: Iris Coleman
description: A data scientist discovers a hidden network that predicts human memory and must decide whether to share it with the world.

title: Silent Forest Algorithms
author: R. K. Vale
description: A detective in a mountain village uses pattern recognition and old journals to solve disappearances connected to a forgotten library.

title: Pages of Light
author: Mina Arora
description: An apprentice archivist finds enchanted manuscripts that rewrite reality each time they are read aloud.

title: Practical Deep Learning for Makers
author: Jonas Pratt
description: Hands-on guide to building machine learning projects with clear code examples, experiments, and deployment tips.

title: The Last Bookmark
author: Ella Montrose
description: A family restores a historic bookstore while uncovering letters that reveal long-buried personal secrets.

title: Data Stories for Product Teams
author: Nate Lumen
description: Explains how product teams can interpret analytics, user behavior, and feedback to design better experiences.
